top_stories.title: Skipping the boring parts of building a database using FoundationDB
Show HN: Tigris – open-source developer data platform for your next app

data.homepage_text: About Docs Blog Pricing Partners Community Sign in Get started The storage cloud for devs & agents Bottomless object storage with zero egress fees. Feed training jobs, serve inference, and checkpoint agent state — all over a familiar S3 API. Get started View documentation 99.99% availability 1M+ buckets 20PB+ storage 10B+ objects @tigrisdata/agent-shell — ~/agent-shell Shell CLI SDK Tigris Agent Shell A virtual bash environment backed by Tigris object storage. booting shell… Agent Shell CLI SDK Skills Trusted by The Product Storage that gets out of your way Tigris® is globally redundant storage, built for the new cloud. Capacity ∞ Bottomless storage No per-account limits. No per-region limits. Just scale. Pricing $0/GB Zero egress fees Read as often as you need, from any region. No bandwidth bills. Compatibility s3:// Speaks S3 natively Point boto3, aws-cli, rclone, PyTorch at Tigris. Swap the endpoint, keep the code. Platform Capabilities Storage primitives for agents and teams The building blocks you already know from S3 — plus the ones you wish it had. Zero-copy forks, point-in-time snapshots, object events, and fine-grained IAM, built for the new cloud. Placement Geo-redundant storage Pick single-region, multi-region, or global placement per bucket. Keep data close to users and redundant across regions without running your own replication. Lifecycle Storage tiers Standard, infrequent, and archive tiers with automatic lifecycle rules. Same API, priced for your data's access pattern. STANDARD INFREQUENT ARCHIVE Experimentation Zero-copy forks Fork a production bucket instantly. Test migrations, run experiments, or give each agent its own sandbox — with no storage duplication. Time travel Snapshots Whole-bucket snapshots. Roll back to any precise second to recover from a bad write, a bug, or a hallucinated agent. 14:02 NOW Coordination Webhooks Webhooks fire the moment an object is created, updated, or deleted. Wire up data pipelines without polling. Access Fine-grained IAM policies S3-compatible IAM plus per-bucket, per-prefix, and per-key policies. Scope credentials down to individual agents. read:objects write:prefix/* admin:users Distribution Custom domains Serve buckets from your own domain with managed TLS. Keep branding consistent across public assets and CDNs. https:// cdn.tigris.dev TLS Delegation Presigned URLs Time-scoped, scope-limited URLs for direct upload and download. Let clients hit storage without ever touching your credentials. 5m Geo-redundant storage Placement Pick single-region, multi-region, or global placement per bucket. Keep data close to users and redundant across regions without running your own replication. Storage tiers Lifecycle Standard, infrequent, and archive tiers with automatic lifecycle rules. Same API, priced for your data's access pattern. STANDARD INFREQUENT ARCHIVE Zero-copy forks Experimentation Fork a production bucket instantly. Test migrations, run experiments, or give each agent its own sandbox — with no storage duplication. Snapshots Time travel Whole-bucket snapshots. Roll back to any precise second to recover from a bad write, a bug, or a hallucinated agent. 14:02 NOW Webhooks Coordination Webhooks fire the moment an object is created, updated, or deleted. Wire up data pipelines without polling. Fine-grained IAM policies Access S3-compatible IAM plus per-bucket, per-prefix, and per-key policies. Scope credentials down to individual agents. read:objects write:prefix/* admin:users Custom domains Distribution Serve buckets from your own domain with managed TLS. Keep branding consistent across public assets and CDNs. https:// cdn.tigris.dev TLS Presigned URLs Delegation Time-scoped, scope-limited URLs for direct upload and download. funding_results.snippet: Tigris Raises $25M to Build the Storage Layer for the AI Era · Announcing Tigris Seed Round led by Andreessen Horowitz.

funding_results.title: Tigris raises $25M for AI-native storage cloud | Tigris Data posted on the topic | LinkedIn
funding_results.snippet: Tigris Data, a distributed data storage startup, has raised $25 million in a Series A round to take on "Big Cloud." Founded by the team behind Uber's storage platform, Tigris is building an AI-native storage platform designed for modern, distributed AI workloads. In September, the Microsoft Bay Area team hosted Accelerate Together, where leaders explored how AI, cloud, and strategic partnerships are reshaping startup innovation, from autonomous agents like Devin by Cognition to powerful enterpri

funding_results.title: Tigris Data Raises $25M for Distributed AI Storage Solution - News and Statistics - IndexBox
funding_results.snippet: Tigris Data Secures $25M Series A for AI Storage Platform. # Tigris Data Secures $25M Series A for AI Storage Platform. *Distributed data storage startup Tigris Data has raised a $25 million Series A round, as first reported by TechCrunch. "Modern AI workloads and AI infrastructure are choosing distributed computing instead of big cloud," Ovais Tariq, co-founder and CEO of Tigris Data, told TechCrunch. Tigris, founded by the team that developed Uber's storage platform, is building a network of l

community_results.snippet: > Tigris means tiger. I'm pretty sure Tigris Data is named after the Tigris river (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tigris), and the name does not mean "tiger".

pricing_results.title: Pricing | Tigris
pricing_results.snippet: |  | Standard | Infrequent Access | Archive | Archive Instant Retrieval |. | Data Storage | $0.02/GB/month | $0.01/GB/month | $0.004/GB/month | $0.004/GB/month |. | Data Retrieval | Free | $0.01/GB | Free | $0.03/GB |. A minimum storage retention charge applies to objects stored in the Infrequent Access, Archive, and Archive Instant Retrieval tiers. For example, objects in the Infrequent Access tier are subject to a minimum storage duration of 30 days. When you restore data from the Archive tier
